sourcesContent:
"use client" import { useContext } from "react" import { ProfileContext } from "../../context/profile/ProfileContext" import Spinner from "../layout/Spinner" const LeetcodeStats = () => { const { leetcodeStats, loading } = useContext(ProfileContext) if (loading) { return } if (!leetcodeStats) { return (

LeetCode Stats

Add your LeetCode profile to see stats here.

) } return (

LeetCode Stats

Total Solved

{leetcodeStats.totalSolved}

Ranking

{leetcodeStats.ranking || "N/A"}

Contest Rating

{leetcodeStats.contestRating || "N/A"}

Contests Attended

{leetcodeStats.contestAttended}

Problem Solving

Easy: {leetcodeStats.easySolved}
Medium: {leetcodeStats.mediumSolved}
Hard: {leetcodeStats.hardSolved}
{leetcodeStats.topTags && leetcodeStats.topTags.length > 0 && (

Top Tags

{leetcodeStats.topTags.map((tag, index) => (

{tag.tagName}

Solved: {tag.problemsSolved}

))}
)} {leetcodeStats.badges && leetcodeStats.badges.length > 0 && (

Badges

{leetcodeStats.badges.map((badge, index) => (

{badge.displayName}

))}
)}
) } export default LeetcodeStats
